announcement: Premium ice cream crafted with love since 1995.
heroKicker: 100+ flavours. 500+ retail outlets. One unforgettable scoop.
heroTitle: India's finest ice cream, now at your doorstep.
heroSubtitle: From traditional Kulfis to Belgian Dark Chocolate, GlacierIce Cream's portfolio spans signature tubs, ice candies, crunchy cones and celebration tubs — all made with stringent quality checks that meet global standards.
featuredSubtitle: Our most-loved scoops — from fruit explosions to rich dark chocolate — picked fresh for the season.
storyBody: GlacierIce Cream is present in every nook and corner of the nation with 500+ retail outlets and over 50 flagship stores across multiple states. We produce premium quality ice cream made with the finest ingredients. From weddings to corporate events, our ice creams are trusted by India's finest institutions.
